component=sqlite3-lsio-mod phase=04-pool-patch event=complete
pool_patch event=patched
[sqlite3-builds-obs] 2026-05-31 sqlite3_open filename=/config/Library/Application Support/Plex Media Server/Plug-in Support/Databases/com.plexapp.plugins.library.db rc=0
